title: Assertion fault on query of virtual table with cross-column constraints
poc: CREATE VIRTUAL TABLE t1 USING fts4(a,b);
description:
drh added on 2014-01-20 19:15:05:
The following SQL script generates an assertion fault:
CREATE VIRTUAL TABLE t1 USING fts4(a,b);
SELECT * FROM t1 WHERE a=b;
Bisecting shows that this problem was introduced on 2013-01-17
(SQLite version 3.7.16) by check-in [38852f158ab20bb4].
dan added on 2014-01-20 19:56:01:
Fixed by [7d9e22187d].
key_bug_features: Assertion fault on query with cross-column constraints
bug_features_seed: CREATE VIRTUAL TABLE t1 USING fts4(a TEXT, b TEXT, c INTEGER);
INSERT INTO t1 (a, b, c) VALUES ('test', 'test', 1);
SELECT * FROM t1 WHERE a IS NULL OR b IS NULL;
CREATE VIRTUAL TABLE t2 USING fts4(x INTEGER, y TEXT);
SELECT * FROM t2 WHERE x = CAST(y AS INTEGER);
